scope: wave1-pilot migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (organizations, groups, campaigns, bitlinks); Bitly's write endpoints (bitlink shorten/create/update, bitlink clicks/qr-code) are out of scope for this pilot (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented bitlink creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented bitlink updates; Pass B capability expansion
click analytics not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
QR code retrieval not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
